title: stevia lehmannii
intro: Stevia lehmannii, also known as the sweetleaf or Paraguayan sweet leaf, is a species of plant belonging to the Stevia genus, native to the subtropical regions of South America, specifically in Paraguay and Argentina. The medicinal properties of Stevia lehmannii include its ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi, making it a potential antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Stevia lehmannii include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and provide antioxidant properties. Stevia lehmannii is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
